bullish: Price is above the 20 EMA on the 4H
Fractal correlation > 0.7 AND fractal phase is recovery
RSI bullish divergence detected (price lower low, RSI higher low)
MACD histogram turning positive after negative streak
Price above Bollinger Bands basis (20 SMA)
bearish: Price is below the 20 EMA on the 4H
Fractal correlation > 0.7 AND fractal phase is correction
RSI bearish divergence detected (price higher high, RSI lower high)
MACD histogram turning negative after positive streak
Price below Bollinger Bands basis (20 SMA)
neutral: Price is chopping around the 20 EMA
No clear divergences on RSI or MACD

phases.correction: Day 0-175 from ATH — expect lower prices, trade cautiously
phases.recovery: Day 175+ — watch for base building, accumulation signals

rules: Bullish divergence: price makes lower low, indicator makes higher low
Bearish divergence: price makes higher high, indicator makes lower high
Hidden bullish: price makes higher low, indicator makes lower low (trend continuation)
Hidden bearish: price makes lower high, indicator makes higher high (trend continuation)

confluence_scoring.method: Count indicators agreeing on direction, score as percentage

risk_rules: Only take trades where R:R is at least 1:2
No trading in the first 15 minutes of the NY session open
If I have 2 losing trades in a row, stop for the day
Reduce position size by 50% when price is within 2% of fractal invalidation level
No new longs if fractal deviation > -10% (significantly below expected path)
notes: 2019 fractal analysis active. BTC currently in recovery phase (Day ~210 from ATH). Price tracking below fractal expected path by ~12.5%. RSI below 50, MACD negative — consistent with 2019 pattern at this stage. Key trigger: RSI reclaiming 50 + MACD crossing positive = recovery confirmation.
